modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Inquiry about ticket status in USD IT Ticketing System

full_description_text:  
User submitted a ticket to USD IT Service Desk.  
They want to know the current status.  
This was done during a live chat session.  
Need quick update on ticket progress.
